improvements: DM call signaling now supports both modern and legacy calls-table schemas without breaking outgoing/incoming flow.
Active call detection now normalizes call state, participants, and expiry so join cards stay accurate across schema variants.
Call session teardown now updates ended state with modern-first and legacy fallback writes for safer disconnect handling.
Friends active-call presence now hydrates from compatible call rows so live call badges and quick-join metadata remain reliable.
Release pipeline now includes schema reconciliation migration to align older deployments with current call signaling expectations.
bugFixes: Fixed DM call startup failures caused by missing calls.conversation_id on legacy databases.
Fixed call acceptance/decline updates failing when calls.state column is unavailable.
Fixed call-ended signaling failures that left stale ringing state on legacy status-based call rows.
Fixed realtime call-state listeners ignoring legacy status payloads and missing remote end/decline transitions.
Fixed active call refresh paths that silently dropped rows when only room/status/callee_id fields existed.
Fixed invite/listing synchronization inconsistencies by resolving room->conversation mapping during calls table subscriptions.

improvements: Quickdraw command navigation is now fully interactive with role-aware views for Find Contracts, Contract Radar, Listed Contracts, Working Contracts, and Escrow History.
Buy/Sell Games storefront chips (Store, New & Trending, Top Sellers, Recently Updated, Your Library) now switch sections correctly and update listing order in real time.
Account Standing now opens detailed briefings in animated modal views, and Billing now surfaces live portal status feedback instead of silently failing.
bugFixes: Fixed DM call initiation from profile/community actions by wiring auto-call route handling for /app/dm/:id?autocall=1.
Fixed server/sidebar moderation UX by adding channel and category right-click context menus plus direct member kick/ban actions in community member context menus.
Fixed streamer mode visibility by showing an in-app top banner when streamer mode is enabled, including privacy-state messaging.

improvements: Quickdraw Deploy now includes a dedicated Issue New Contract modal with staged draft and funding-queue actions for founder workflows.
Quickdraw command rail now separates Find Contracts (being hired) and Deploy (hiring) views with richer operations navigation and deploy-queue visibility.
Games marketplace storefront upgraded toward a Steam-style browsing surface with featured capsule controls, category chips, and improved game card presentation.
Settings rollout now persists advanced app toggles locally and syncs Streamer Mode preferences into the desktop runtime in real time.
bugFixes: Fixed DM call signaling reliability by shortening stale ring windows and preventing old ringing rows from blocking new outgoing calls.
Added bandwidth-safe auto-disconnect behavior for unattended call sessions to reduce idle media usage.
Fixed desktop notification behavior so Streamer Mode can suppress sounds and hide DM/call previews in both renderer and Electron main-process notifications.
Updated billing action label to open the NCore Building Portal via Stripe from billing surfaces.

improvements: Marketplace now uses dedicated Quickdraw and Games experiences with role-oriented layouts, command rail navigation, and searchable contract/store grids.
Quickdraw now includes in-app briefing modals for Terms of Engagement, Tier II Clearance, and Operational Protocols to guide hiring and specialist workflows.
Games marketplace now uses a storefront-style presentation with featured listing surface, richer metadata cards, and clearer installer access paths.

Settings rollout expanded with live controls across Chat, Keybinds, Language & Time, Windows Settings, Streamer Mode, Advanced, Activity Privacy, Registered Games, Game Overlay, NCore Boost, Server Boost, Subscriptions, Gift Inventory, and Billing.
bugFixes: Fixed marketplace runtime failure path when marketplace_service_disputes is not yet present in Supabase schema cache, allowing marketplace/admin surfaces to continue loading.
Improved DM fallback call behavior by carrying caller intent and adding outgoing ring timeout handling so stalled calls auto-disconnect cleanly.
Connections tab now uses platform logos instead of emoji markers and supports expanded provider catalog with explicit coming-soon flags where OAuth is not enabled.
Resolved TypeScript build blockers for release pipeline by stabilizing app-level type checks and cleaning strict compile-path regressions introduced by mixed runtime data typing.

improvements: Auto-update installer flow now runs a stronger uninstall fallback path when replacing an older NCore build.
Installer startup now force-cleans lingering Electron helper and crashpad processes before uninstall/update starts.
Fallback uninstall now retries current-user and all-users silent paths before final cleanup to reduce manual installer retries.
bugFixes: Fixed updater failure path that could show uninstall-old-version errors even when the main NCore window was already closed.
Fixed locked-file update scenarios by expanding installer process termination coverage beyond only NCore.exe.
Improved update reliability for users receiving auto-downloaded patches from in-app updater.

improvements: Marketplace now includes My Service Orders and My Game Purchases panels with clearer lifecycle visibility.
Quickdraw workflows were expanded with in-app order actions for delivered, escrow release, and dispute creation.
Admin Panel now includes a dedicated Marketplace moderation section for seller clearance, listing review, and dispute resolution.
bugFixes: Resolved missing marketplace hydration paths so order/dispute context now loads with profile and listing detail mapping.
Improved release pipeline consistency by requiring curated notes before feed sync, preventing generic log drift.
Maintained icon and installer feed alignment with website update metadata for cleaner release rollout behavior.

improvements: NCore Marketplace now includes two new tracks: Quickdraw Services and Buy/Sell Games alongside cosmetics.
Added seller clearance + vetting flow foundation, wallet snapshot, service listings, and game listing creation in-app.
Checkout flow now supports service listing fees, service orders, game publish fees, and game purchases through Stripe sessions.
Startup performance pass reduced DM bootstrap fan-out and community membership resubscribe churn for faster launch feel.
bugFixes: Marketplace backend now persists marketplace payment lifecycle events through webhook handling and order status transitions.
Fixed auth/session handoff path for marketplace checkout retries by refreshing expired JWT before second attempt.
Database schema now includes escrow/order/wallet primitives needed for Quickdraw and game marketplace reliability.

improvements: Desktop launch flow now skips PWA runtime bootstrap so Electron startup is faster and cleaner.
Community rail now restores from local cache first, then hydrates in the background to reduce first-load waiting.
Direct Messages startup hydration was tuned to load a capped recent set first, with leaner profile payloads and lighter active-call sync.
bugFixes: Removed heavy boot-time community member fan-out hydration that was causing slow startup spikes.
Reduced unnecessary DM bootstrap query pressure that could make initial app open feel laggy.
Improved startup responsiveness by prioritizing first render before non-critical background work.

improvements: Website landing page was fully overhauled into a cleaner, more professional product-site layout with stronger visual hierarchy.
Hero, platform, compare, and deploy sections were rebuilt for clearer messaging and better credibility at first glance.
Mobile and desktop website presentation now use a more polished structure while preserving existing installer and PWA download behavior.
bugFixes: Removed dense legacy landing composition that made the public site feel cluttered and less professional.
Improved content organization so release, deployment, and platform information are easier to scan quickly.
Kept website branding and logo fallback behavior consistent while modernizing page structure.

improvements: Windows installer now includes a pre-install process cleanup step for NCore desktop runtime.
Update installs now handle hidden tray/background sessions automatically without requiring manual process hunting.
Release and web update feed remain aligned to the latest NSIS package and metadata.
bugFixes: Fixed setup blocker where installer reported NCore could not be closed even when no main window was open.
Fixed hidden-process update deadlock caused by tray-mode runtime instances remaining active during install.
Improved installation reliability for users updating from website downloads while NCore background tasks are running.

improvements: Auto-update install flow now forces updater quit mode before install so background/tray behavior no longer blocks patch application.
Updater now tears down tray state and closes all windows before invoking quit-and-install to avoid hidden-window shutdown deadlocks.
Desktop updater fallback path now escalates to forced app exit if normal quit-and-install does not terminate promptly.
bugFixes: Fixed failure mode where update download completed but NCore stayed running and users had to install manually.
Fixed close-to-tray interception during update install by bypassing normal hide-on-close behavior while installing.
Improved updater reliability on Windows by handling before-quit-for-update with explicit app quit flags.

improvements: Mobile layout detection now combines viewport + device runtime checks so phones no longer fall into desktop Settings/Admin split panes.
Settings page now hard-switches to dedicated mobile navigation mode on handheld devices for cleaner one-column rendering.
Admin panel now follows the same mobile-first detection path so mobile moderation screens use touch-friendly section tabs.
bugFixes: Fixed iPhone/Android rendering issue where Settings could show desktop left-nav plus clipped content side-by-side.
Fixed mobile admin navigation mismatch where desktop rail could appear even when the app was opened on a phone.
Added mobile CSS safety guards to suppress desktop-only nav panes when runtime is flagged as mobile.

improvements: Stabilized direct-call fallback join flow by removing a stale undefined timer mutation that could break call transitions.
Marketplace and billing URL opening now normalizes absolute, relative, and domain-only links so checkout routing is more resilient across desktop/web contexts.
Server settings delete flow now supports a direct owner delete fallback path when the delete RPC is unavailable on a deployment.
bugFixes: Fixed runtime crash risk in Direct Call fallback flow caused by an undefined call-duration setter reference.
Fixed checkout launcher failures that surfaced as invalid URL errors for otherwise recoverable URL formats.
Fixed server deletion dead-end scenarios when delete_owned_community RPC was missing by adding guarded fallback delete handling.

improvements: Mobile Settings now uses a dedicated section selector instead of a compressed desktop sidebar.
Admin Panel now has phone-optimized navigation chips for quick tab switching without layout squeeze.
Settings and Admin content areas now expand to full mobile width with tighter spacing for touch screens.
bugFixes: Fixed the split-pane overflow bug that made Settings unreadable on iPhone and Android.
Fixed Admin navigation collapsing behavior on mobile where labels were hidden and content was clipped.
Fixed narrow-screen rendering regressions that caused desktop columns to overlap in portrait mode.

improvements: Web/PWA build pipeline now emits absolute asset URLs for website deployments so deep links load reliably.
Electron packaging now uses a dedicated build mode to keep relative file:// assets without affecting web releases.
iOS installed-app startup is now aligned with route-based start URLs used by NCore PWA entrypoints.
bugFixes: Fixed iPhone home-screen white screen caused by relative asset paths when launching from /app/* start URLs.
Fixed deep-link startup asset resolution for web app installs opened directly into DM/app routes.
Fixed build-mode crossover where Electron-compatible paths could leak into website output.

improvements: iPhone startup path now runs an automatic one-time recovery pass to remove stale web app runtime caches.
Standalone mobile launches now self-heal by forcing a clean navigation after legacy service-worker cleanup.
PWA install flow reliability improved for users upgrading from older iOS web app builds.
bugFixes: Fixed iOS home-screen launch blank state caused by stale service worker/cache state from prior builds.
Fixed persistent white screen scenario where installed web app could stay pinned to outdated startup assets.
Improved startup consistency between Safari-tab usage and installed web app usage on iPhone.

improvements: Web runtime snapshot handling was hardened so Firefox and Safari render reliably after load.
PWA boot path now keeps a stable external-store snapshot to prevent client render loops.
Service worker recovery flow remains available via ?sw-reset=1 for stale-client cleanup.
bugFixes: Fixed blank-page crash on web caused by unstable useSyncExternalStore snapshot reads in PWA runtime.
Fixed production startup loop where repeated snapshot object creation could trigger React update-depth failure.
Improved cross-browser launch stability on ncore.nyptidindustries.com after fresh deploys.

improvements: Added a dedicated mobile update feed file at /updates/mobile-latest.json for installer-aware mobile download routing.
Landing page now reads feed metadata first so Android users are sent to the latest published APK automatically when available.
Settings > What's New download flow now supports desktop updater, browser desktop installer download, and mobile installer/PWA fallback paths.
bugFixes: Fixed mobile download flow relying only on hardcoded APK filename probes by introducing feed-driven resolution.
Fixed update UX mismatch where web/mobile users were told desktop updater only, despite having a valid hosted feed.
Fixed release sync gap by generating and publishing mobile-latest.json with every feed sync.

improvements: Landing page download now routes by device: desktop keeps Windows installer while mobile gets install-ready flow.
Android now auto-detects hosted APK candidates under /updates and serves them when available.
PWA install support added (manifest + service worker) so iOS/Android users can install NCore from the site.
bugFixes: Fixed server deletion reliability by moving delete into a secure owner-verified RPC path.
Updated server settings delete action to use backend RPC instead of fragile direct table delete.
Improved mobile app shell and DM layout behavior for smaller screens.

improvements: Friend add flow now uses true request-based behavior: sending a request puts it in Pending until the other user accepts.
Friends page now includes a Pending tab with incoming and outgoing request cards, plus Accept, Decline, and Cancel controls.
Shared-server right-click Add Friend now follows the same pending-request system for consistent behavior across NCore.
bugFixes: Fixed immediate auto-friend behavior so users are no longer connected instantly when a request is sent.
Fixed inconsistent relationship state handling by adding explicit pending incoming/outgoing states to backend relationship logic.
Fixed request lifecycle edge cases with dedicated send/respond/cancel RPC paths and synchronized client refresh handling.

improvements: Server member right-click menu now includes Profile, Mention, Message, Start a Call, Add Note, Invite to Server, Add Friend, Ignore, and Block.
Mention from a server member now pre-fills @username directly into server chat and opens the channel route automatically.
Invite to Server from the context menu now creates a one-use invite link and sends it through DM for faster onboarding.
bugFixes: Fixed missing server-member context actions in community views where right-click previously had no moderation/social shortcuts.
Fixed mention flow so server mentions no longer require manual typing after opening chat.
Improved shared-server relationship action reliability for friend, ignore, and block updates from the member context menu.

improvements: DM conversations now promote to the top immediately when you send a message, including group DMs.
DM send flow now also updates conversation activity timestamps in direct_conversations for stable cross-client ordering.
Call start flow now uses stronger recipient resolution fallbacks before failing, improving reliability when membership lookups are inconsistent.
bugFixes: Fixed DM call start route bug where fallback join mode was not always enabled when calls-table signaling failed to create a row.
Fixed strict call auth preflight behavior that could block calling on temporary verify failures even with a valid local session.
Fixed no-recipient call edge case by adding a secondary members lookup and deduped recipient normalization.

improvements: Added distinct notification sound types across NCore: call ring, direct message ding, and mention/ping alert.
Server mentions now generate mention notifications for @username, <@id>, @everyone, and @here so ping events are detected reliably.
Desktop background notifications now keep sound behavior aligned with in-app routing for calls, DMs, and pings.
bugFixes: Fixed missing server ping sound path where channel mentions were not being queued as mention notifications.
Fixed desktop notification audio fallback using one generic sound for all events; call and mention now use separate patterns.
Improved mention-notification insertion safety to avoid send-flow interruption when notification writes fail.

improvements: Added owner-controlled server deletion flow in Server Settings with typed confirmation and final safety prompt.
Added a full Friends surface with Online/All/Add Friend tabs, add-by-username flow, and quick Message/Voice/Video actions.
Added custom status text + emoji persistence and profile rendering support.
Expanded Settings navigation to include Discord-style sections (chat, keybinds, language/time, streamer mode, activity, and billing groups).
Brand icon sync now prioritizes NCore.jpg when present so installer, runtime icon resources, and website branding stay aligned.
bugFixes: Fixed missing custom status DB fields by shipping and applying migration 20260315164000 to remote Supabase.
Fixed logo source mismatch where JPG branding assets could be ignored in icon generation.
Added runtime logo fallbacks so clients recover cleanly between NCore.jpg and ncore-logo.png across key pages.
Ensured release version increments to 11.7.43 and build artifacts regenerate against the new version metadata.

improvements: Windows desktop now uses a cleaner hidden-titlebar overlay layout so the app surface feels closer to a single unified Discord-style top chrome.
Top navigation now reserves right-side space for native window controls in desktop builds to avoid overlap with search/notification/profile controls.
Desktop branding and update feed deployment remain synchronized with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Fixed remaining heavy native titlebar appearance that made NCore look less clean than intended.
Fixed top-right control crowding in desktop runtime when window buttons share the same horizontal band as app actions.
Improved desktop UI consistency so updated chrome behavior is delivered to all clients through the same versioned installer feed.

improvements: Windows executable resource editing is now enabled during packaging so the installed launcher icon and metadata are stamped from NCore branding.
Settings content layout now uses full available desktop width so the page no longer feels constrained after update.
Release and website feed continue to publish from the same installer artifact to keep all clients aligned.
bugFixes: Fixed stale launcher metadata path where Start menu/Recommended could continue showing legacy icon identity.
Fixed remaining narrow Settings content behavior on larger fullscreen windows.
Improved packaging consistency so new installs pick up the current NCore visual identity faster.

improvements: Settings now uses a full desktop-width content layout so fullscreen no longer stays in the old narrow column mode.
Publisher/byline labeling is now aligned to NYPTID Industries Advanced Technologies across settings metadata surfaces.
Desktop release packaging and website update feed remain synchronized to keep both clients on the same UI build.
bugFixes: Fixed legacy Settings container width cap that made updated UI changes look like they were not applied.
Fixed client-to-client visual mismatch where two users on the same version could still see the old compact Settings layout.
Improved update visibility so this patch appears cleanly in What’s New after install/update.

improvements: Windows installer metadata now includes explicit organization details for stronger Publisher identity in desktop environments.
Packaging metadata now ships complete app description and legal branding fields for cleaner install/uninstall surfaces.
Release pipeline remains aligned to website + desktop updater with the newest installer artifacts.
bugFixes: Fixed installer build failure caused by invalid electron-builder keys in the previous packaging config attempt.
Restored valid build schema so installer generation and release sync complete successfully.
Improved metadata consistency between app package fields and Windows installer outputs.

improvements: Brand icon generation is now automatic during packaging, so the Windows app icon is rebuilt directly from the exact `public/ncore-logo.png` asset each release.
Desktop installer and runtime icon resources now stay synchronized from one logo source to reduce logo drift across taskbar, window, and installer surfaces.
Release changelog flow continues to publish cleaner user-facing notes in both website feed and in-app What's New.
bugFixes: Fixed logo pipeline fragility where stale `.ico` assets could persist between builds.
Fixed update-log quality drift by enforcing curated notes for each version bump before feed sync.
Improved release consistency between installer artifacts and update metadata publication.

improvements: What's New entries are now written in a cleaner user-facing format so update logs read like product changes, not internal pipeline notes.
Notification/update feed alignment was tightened so the same release details appear consistently in app settings and website update endpoints.
Release metadata flow was hardened to keep top entries ordered and readable after every version bump.
bugFixes: Fixed repetitive boilerplate wording that made multiple releases look identical.
Fixed release-note generation fallback path so new versions no longer silently publish generic copy.
Improved changelog reliability by requiring curated notes before a new release is synced.

improvements: What's New release entries now publish from curated notes so each version shows real update details instead of repeated boilerplate text.
Release feed sync now preserves detailed notes on rebuilds and re-deploys for the same version.
Desktop and website update metadata remain aligned while keeping detailed changelog entries intact.
bugFixes: Fixed release note overwrite behavior that could replace detailed logs with generic fallback copy.
Fixed pending release note discovery so deployment can read note payloads from the project root reliably.
Improved update-log consistency between app Settings > What's New and the public /updates release notes feed.

improvements: App now opens DM-first by default (`/app` routes directly to `/app/dm`) for a chat-focused launch flow.
Server member counts now sync in real time across shell, community pages, and sidebar labels.
Community member lists now live-refresh profile details (username, display name, avatar, and status).
DM and Group DM membership now live-refresh when members are added, removed, or conversation metadata changes.
bugFixes: Fixed stale member totals where some views showed old counts after joins/leaves.
Fixed profile hydration drift in community member cards that could show fallback or outdated identity data.
Fixed release-note pipeline overwriting detailed entries with generic boilerplate on subsequent syncs.

improvements: Release pipeline advanced to v11.7.33 with the newest installer package.
Desktop installer and website update feed are now aligned.
What's New and release metadata now stay in sync automatically per version bump.
bugFixes: Fixed feed mismatch where latest installer version could advance without a matching top release note entry.
Release badge rotation now updates consistently so only the newest entry is marked Current Build.
Improved deployment consistency for update metadata across public and dist feed directories.

improvements: Release pipeline advanced to v11.7.32 with the newest installer package.
Desktop installer and website update feed are now aligned.
What's New and release metadata now stay in sync automatically per version bump.
bugFixes: Fixed feed mismatch where latest installer version could advance without a matching top release note entry.
Release badge rotation now updates consistently so only the newest entry is marked Current Build.
Improved deployment consistency for update metadata across public and dist feed directories.

improvements: Release pipeline advanced to v11.7.31 with the newest installer package.
Desktop installer and website update feed are now aligned.
What's New and release metadata now stay in sync automatically per version bump.
bugFixes: Fixed feed mismatch where latest installer version could advance without a matching top release note entry.
Release badge rotation now updates consistently so only the newest entry is marked Current Build.
Improved deployment consistency for update metadata across public and dist feed directories.

improvements: Fixed Settings section routing so tabs like What's New no longer glitch or bounce between sections.
Server settings now include invite management with open/invite-only join control plus create/copy/revoke invite links.
Server moderation panel now supports role changes, member removal, and ownership transfer with live profile hydration.
bugFixes: Fixed server settings layout leak by hiding channel sidebar while editing server settings.
Improved channel sidebar reliability by converting channel rows to proper buttons and hardening wheel-scroll behavior.
Added invite-only enforcement at DB policy/RPC layer to prevent bypass joins and stabilize public-but-invite-only servers.

improvements: Removed the course-first community overview so normal server usage now focuses on chat and member presence.
Server settings now include a full add/remove role editor so owners can create and customize role labels directly.
Community and sidebar data hydration now resolves real profile records to keep usernames and avatars accurate across member/voice surfaces.
bugFixes: Fixed member card fallbacks caused by profile relation mismatches (`profiles` vs `profile`) that showed generic names/avatars.
Removed stale Courses quick-link wiring from the channel sidebar to prevent dead-end navigation.
Hardened left sidebar scrolling (wheel + min-height overflow behavior) to stop stuck/bugged scroll behavior in long channel lists.

improvements: Added AnimeHub server preset with a full category/channel layout for anime communities.
Community creation now supports preset selection and auto-seeds server customization defaults for role labels and onboarding.
Server sidebar now supports owner/admin category creation and text/voice channel creation directly from the channel list.
bugFixes: What's New now resolves release notes from the configured update feed URL instead of stale local-only fallback data.
Notification bell now surfaces product update entries with unread version tracking and direct jump to What's New.
Community chat bootstrap now seeds template channels when missing, improving Discord-style server consistency for new servers.

improvements: Auth routing now ships a source-owned AuthPage again so login/signup updates are included in production builds.
Login and signup surfaces now use NCore branding with live global stats from Supabase instead of hardcoded values.
Onboarding header now uses the same NCore logo asset pipeline as the website and app shell.
bugFixes: Marketplace checkout now sends both Authorization header and body token to reduce edge-function auth mismatches.
Checkout external-open flow now validates and normalizes Stripe URLs before launch to avoid invalid URL failures.
Release feed aligned to v11.7.27 with new installer and blockmap.

improvements: Auto-updater feed now points directly to the newest NCore installer build.
Dedicated NCore Marketplace section in the primary app navigation.
Expanded membership overview with Free, NYPTID Boost, and additional monthly plan tracks.
bugFixes: Voice call speaking-state updates are throttled to prevent UI freeze spikes.
Channel sidebar now uses stable desktop layout behavior for server navigation.
Top-level server route behavior refined to reduce sidebar sync glitches.

improvements: Marketplace checkout now uses Supabase client session auth by default, with refresh-and-retry only when needed.
Billing flows now open Stripe externally while preserving app session state across retries.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.21 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Fixed false session-expired errors triggered by stale explicit Authorization headers during marketplace purchases.
Improved checkout auth error surfacing so repeated JWT failures show backend detail instead of silent logout loops.
Release stack metadata aligned to v11.7.21.

improvements: Marketplace purchases now launch Stripe checkout externally in desktop builds so NCore stays open in-app.
Membership checkout and billing portal now use the same external-open checkout behavior.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.20 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Removed forced billing-session refresh behavior that could drop users back to login during buy attempts.
Checkout JWT recovery now retries with current in-session auth state without triggering sign-out side effects.
Release stack metadata aligned to v11.7.20.

improvements: Marketplace and membership checkout flows now preserve signed-in state during auth-recovery failures.
Billing session refresh now prefers in-session token recovery before asking for manual re-login.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.19 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Fixed marketplace purchase path that could force sign-out and redirect away from checkout.
Removed forced logout side effects on JWT retry failures in billing actions.
Release stack metadata aligned to v11.7.19.

improvements: Added explicit fallback call routing (`fallback=1`) when calls-table signaling is unavailable.
Desktop/notification call join paths now preserve fallback mode so both users can still connect.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.18 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Fixed broken DM call flow when `calls` API lookup/insert returns 400/401.
Reduced repeated active-call lookup spam by disabling failing calls-table polling and using fallback invite path.
Release stack metadata aligned to v11.7.18.

improvements: Direct-call page now exits back to DMs when no active call row exists, instead of remaining in an idle waiting state.
End-call actions now route away first and run teardown immediately after, improving perceived responsiveness.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.17 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Fixed call-end flow that could look frozen by leaving users on the Direct Call screen after hangup.
Prevented stale fallback auto-join from keeping users stuck in a call layout without an active call record.
Release stack metadata aligned to v11.7.17.

improvements: Direct-call teardown now force-cleans local media/session state before waiting on RTC leave.
Call hangup now uses strict teardown timeout bounds so app navigation remains responsive.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.16 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Mitigated call-end freeze caused by stalled media/client shutdown paths during hangup.
Added forced local cleanup fallback when teardown or RTC leave exceeds timeout.
Release stack metadata aligned to v11.7.16.

improvements: Billing auth now server-validates JWTs before checkout, not only local expiry.
Marketplace and membership billing flows now auto-refresh, retry once, then cleanly force re-login when session recovery fails.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.15 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Fixed repeated Invalid JWT checkout failures caused by stale but unexpired local access tokens.
Added invalid-JWT recovery retry path for both checkout and billing portal actions.
Release stack metadata aligned to v11.7.15.

improvements: Billing calls now pass an explicit freshly refreshed bearer token to Supabase edge functions.
Marketplace and membership purchase actions share the same hardened auth refresh path.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.14 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Mitigated persistent Invalid JWT checkout failures caused by stale function invocation auth headers.
Added stronger auth guard coverage for both checkout and billing portal flows.
Release stack metadata aligned to v11.7.14.

improvements: App shell visuals now use a stronger red and gold style treatment across cards and shared controls.
Warm surface palette was deepened so the UI no longer reads as neutral gray in most layouts.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.13 with latest installer package.
bugFixes: Auth-session refresh guard now runs before billing checkout and portal calls to reduce Invalid JWT failures.
Secondary action surfaces now render with warm branded gradients for visual consistency.
Release notes and installer metadata aligned to the newest build.

improvements: Marketplace and membership billing actions now pre-refresh auth sessions before calling Stripe edge functions.
Core app surface palette shifted to warmer red/gold-tinted dark tones across shared surface classes.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.12 with the newest installer package.
bugFixes: Reduced Invalid JWT purchase failures caused by expired auth tokens during checkout start.
Improved checkout error path messaging with clearer session-invalid guidance.
Release stack metadata aligned with the latest package and web deployment.

improvements: Marketplace cosmetic selection no longer triggers extra store reloads while browsing.
Compact card-to-preview flow remains stable while switching between cosmetic items.
Installer and website feed advanced to v11.7.11.
bugFixes: Fixed marketplace re-fetch loop caused by cosmetic selection state dependencies.
Improved marketplace responsiveness when previewing and buying cosmetics.
Release metadata aligned with the newest installer package.

improvements: Marketplace now uses a compact card layout with a dedicated live cosmetic preview panel.
Each cosmetic now includes clear effect details and tag labels before checkout.
Global app accent palette shifted to a red and gold visual direction.
bugFixes: Checkout flow now surfaces exact Edge Function error text instead of only a generic non-2xx message.
Marketplace checkout now sends full item metadata to support backend SKU self-heal logic.
Release feed advanced to v11.7.10 with new installer package.

improvements: Windows packaging now uses the NCore app identity instead of the old starter package identity.
Installer now forces NCore desktop/start shortcuts for easier launch and pinning.
Update feed advanced to v11.7.9 with the new installer output.
bugFixes: Fixed installer path branding issue that could place NCore under the old starter folder name.
Improved executable discovery so users can launch NCore directly from created shortcuts.
Reduced confusion around missing NCore.exe by aligning package metadata with product name.

improvements: Missed DM/group call invites remain joinable longer with an expanded active-call window.
Active call cards continue to show live participants with one-click green Join actions.
Release track advanced to v11.7.8 with auto-synced installer metadata.
bugFixes: Removed remaining blocking hangup awaits in direct-call page transitions to reduce freeze risk when calls end.
Call-decline route now exits immediately while hangup teardown runs in the background.
Realtime end-call listeners now issue non-blocking session teardown.

improvements: DM and group DM list now surfaces active-call state with in-place green Join buttons.
Conversation header now shows an active-call card with participants and one-click join.
Stripe Boost checkout now supports dynamic subscription pricing without requiring a pre-made Stripe product.
bugFixes: Additional hangup teardown timeout guards to prevent call-end UI freezing when RTC leave stalls.
Call restart now reuses an existing ringing/accepted call row instead of creating duplicates.
Active call metadata now persists video-call intent for correct join routing.

improvements: One-time Marketplace gifting checkout added so items can be purchased for other users.
Marketplace catalog expanded with additional permanent cosmetic packs.
Desktop runtime now keeps stronger background notification behavior with startup persistence for packaged Windows builds.
bugFixes: Fixed DM call end-flow freeze by making hangup re-entrant-safe and non-blocking for UI navigation.
Improved direct call teardown sequencing to prevent duplicate hangup contention.
Rebuilt NCore icon asset with valid ICO format for Windows installer/taskbar usage.

improvements: Release pipeline now auto-publishes the newest NSIS installer and latest.yml in one pass.
Community sidebar loader now auto-heals missing server/category/channel structure for admins.
NCore Marketplace remains in the main rail between Discover and DMs.
bugFixes: Fixed mobile channel-sidebar ghost strip next to the server rail when collapsed.
